headline: Jim Cramer Notes “Keysight’s Found a Big Business With AI Data Centers”
summary: Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:KEYS) is one of the S&P 500 stocks that Jim Cramer shared his take on. Cramer noted the company’s AI-related business. headline: Keysight Demonstrates 5G-Advanced AI-Powered Channel State Information Compression and Paves the Way for 6G
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 04, 2026--Joint lab validation shows more than 40 percent downlink throughput gain versus standardized channel feedback in four-layer (rank-4) operation
